channel.title: Comments for page "Overheard At Deer"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Overheard At Deer"

item.content:encoded: Time to write #OverheardAtICSUT
It wouldn't be an article about college students if I didn't say "nice"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't have any clue about the canon behind this, but I loved it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This can stand completely on it's own, not even related to any canon or hell anything on the SCP Wiki in general, and it's goddamn hilarious.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This has a really nice GAW type of energy to it.

item.title: Re: +50
item.content:encoded: I thought that was Diet Ghost.

item.title: Re: +50
item.content:encoded: LaCroix is just the ghost real soda leaves behind when it dies
THE JUICE IS LOOSE

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: ARD and I decided that this was both our finest and darkest moment, the black pearl of our writing careers.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm also going to go buy a Lacroix just to see what all the fuss is about so I have this to thank for that as well.

this is the worst possible result of this article being published

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I only learned about Lacroix the day before reading this, so my first thought upon seeing the word was 'this is going to fly over my head.' But to my surprise it didn't fly over my head. But more than that, this was a thoroughly enjoyable, humorous and well-made article. I'm also going to go buy a Lacroix just to see what all the fuss is about so I have this to thank for that as well. Good shit. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
LaCoix is just homeopathic soda.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
#OverheardAtDeer is statistics the dark souls of divination?

This… is… I can't even think of a word that would accurately describe the level of beauty of this analogy. I want to frame it on my wall.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is so bizarre and funny that I can’t help but love it. The amount of worldbuilding only makes it better.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I loved it, I upvoted it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
As someone who has both tried and tried to like LaCroix and Perrier because the people around me used to drink it a lot… bleargh.

Love the formatting and the slice-of-life look into the lives of the occult university stories! Roommate who is part owl is my favorite.

Also there is a mantis on my windowsill at the moment. I said hello to it and it turned its head and looked at me. I assume this is not coincidence.

ETA: I started listening to the Pyre soundtrack and now window mantis is doing a wiggle dance, whaaaat

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The pseudo-tweet format is so good for little bite-size chunks of magical hijinx. Gets in, gets out without getting you sick of the conceit.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm so lost on these but this is so cool it's got me interested in Third Law.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Fuckin genius

item.title: hot take: beer is just bread-flavored lacroix
item.content:encoded:
After ch00bakka posted About Deer, I kept telling them they needed to write one about the various silly social media posts that would inevitably spring from such a school. Today I sent them a few Facebook posts I thought would give them inspiration, including "hot take: beer is just bread-flavored lacroix".

Then we started shitposting about lacroix, and the rest is history.

Huge thanks to ch00bakka for doing all the heavy lifting like importing the tweet formatting (courtesy of TyGently) and doing the handles, images, and timestamps. I would never have the patience for that stuff and thus could never have written this without them.

Also wow, I just realized that this is my 50th article for the site. Crazy how that happens.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Sometimes you start talking shit in IRC and 7 hours later you've got a spicy new tale. ARD wrote most of the tweets, I did the handles and images. The sexy formatting is from TyGently's Intermission, which you should read because it's great.

Secret canon: Jean Cena is an scp-3331-1 instance. She's a trans lesbian and a Theatre/Ontokinetics major here to apply her natural Cena reality-bending abilities to the greatest performance art of them all, professional wrestling.

Tweets which didn't quite make the cut:
[2:19pm] ARD: “We imported a poltergeist from Topeka”
[2:21pm] ARD: “Update: the poltergeist had to move back to Topeka. It said that the property taxes on cursed dolls were too high”

[2:39pm] ch00bakka: “hey i’m a freshman, is this sort of thing normal? will this jsut keep happening w different drinks?”
[2:40pm] ARD: “Depends in which house you pledge”
[2:41pm] ARD: “Last year it was Boost - the secret of my energy”
[2:41pm] ARD: .y boost is the secret of my energy
[2:41pm] Gordon: ARD: Boost Is the secret of my energy [old advrt] - length 33s - 33↑4↓ - 9,541 views - Rakesh Mohan on 2012.09.17 - http://youtube.com/watch?v=srIlU93piAI
